Convert CO2 mole fraction to partial pressure (deprecated)

Source: R/xco2_to_pco2.R
xco2_to_pco2-deprecated.Rd

This function is deprecated. Please use xco2_to_pco2() instead.

Usage

xCO2_to_pCO2(xCO2_ppm, temp_water, atmo_press, press_units, ...)

Arguments

xCO2_ppm

Use xco2_ppm instead.

Examples

# Old:
# xCO2_to_pCO2(
#   xCO2_ppm = 420,
#   temp_water = 20,
#   atmo_press = 101.325,
#   press_units = "kPa"
# )
# New:
xco2_to_pco2(
  xco2_ppm = 420,
  temp_water = 20,
  atmo_press = 101.325,
  press_units = "kPa"
)
#> [1] 410.3039
